creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
And this breaks packaging of lang/gcc* that generate plist dynamically,  post-install is too early for this.

Some logs:

http://package22.nyi.freebsd.org/data/103i386-default-PR214780/2016-11-27_08h09m31s/logs/errors/gcc46-4.6.4_5,1.log
